growth_records.cite: Zhu et al. Characterization of phytoplankton-excreted metabolites mediating carbon flux through the surface ocean. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America (2026). DOI:10.1073/pnas.2531765123. [PMC13012070]
growth_records.snippet: Crocosphaera watsonii WH8501 ... SO ... 27 ... 55 (14:10) ... Exponential phase growth rate (d-1) 0.24
growth_records.notes: Table 1 reports exponential-phase growth rate = 0.24 d-1 directly (RFU-based, batch tube culture). Converted to per-hour: mu = 0.24/24 = 0.01 h-1; doubling_time_h = ln2/0.01 = 69.31 h. Culture inoculated into 25 mL borosilicate tubes, 14:10 h light:dark cycle, 55 umol photons m-2 s-1, monitored via relative fluorescence units (RFU).
